creator: erick@kinnee.net
text:
I've tried the following:
Boot with kb attached and pressing "7"
	Doesn't work. System hangs and wants to reboot, atkbd0 reports error 6.
Boot with kb attached and boot default
	atkbd0 reports error 6 just like it does above.
Boot without kb.
	Boots. No keyboard though.
Boot with keyboard and quickly unplug after choosing "7"
	Boots. Loads sysinstall but re-connecting the kb gets you nothing.
